welcome.headline: Tu estudio completo para crear música
welcome.subheadline: Crea, colabora y publica tu música con herramientas de IA y sonido de estudio profesional — todo en la nube.
welcome.legal_note: Al continuar, aceptas nuestros {terms_link} y nuestra {privacy_link}.

_notes.legal_note: [PLACEHOLDER] {terms_link} and {privacy_link} are inline hyperlinks. Do not reorder.

signup.page_subtitle: Únete a {user_count} músicos y productores en ECHOCRAFT.

signin.page_subtitle: Accede para volver a tu estudio.

_notes.page_title: Transcreation decision: 'Welcome back' rendered as 'Hola de nuevo' to avoid gendered adjective agreement (bienvenido/a) while preserving warm, personal tone per es-ES voice DNA.
_notes.signup_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signup_link} is an inline hyperlink. ECHOCRAFT always uppercase.
_notes.submit_button: Must match dashboard.nav.sign_in — both use 'Iniciar sesión'.

profile_setup.page_subtitle: Cuéntanos sobre ti para personalizar tu experiencia.

_notes.field_role_option_mixing_engineer: [GENDER HOOK] Masculine form used as default. Flag for design review if gender-inclusive form is required (e.g. 'Ingeniero/a de mezclas').
_notes.field_role_option_sound_designer: [GENDER HOOK] Masculine form used as default. Same consideration as mixing_engineer.

plan_selection.page_subtitle: Desde artistas en solitario hasta equipos de producción, tenemos el plan ideal para tu forma de crear.
plan_selection.audience_tab_creator_description: Para músicos y productores en solitario
plan_selection.billing_free_trial_note: Empieza tu prueba gratuita — sin tarjeta de crédito.

_notes.audience_tab_creator: Approved es-ES term per ontology (plan_00000001). Do not translate.
_notes.audience_tab_studio: [REVIEW] 'Studio' as plan group has no approved es-ES term in ontology. Kept in English. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.tier_label_starter: Brand tier name. Do not translate.
_notes.tier_label_pro: Brand tier name. Do not translate.
_notes.tier_label_max: Brand tier name. Do not translate.
_notes.tier_badge_popular: [EXPANSION RISK] Expanded from 'Most Popular' (12 chars) to 'El más popular' (14 chars). Monitor badge UI.

_notes.creator_starter_name: Approved es-ES plan name per ontology (plan_00000002). Tier labels (Starter, Pro, Max) not translated.
_notes.creator_pro_tagline: Transcreation of 'Full songwriting workflow'. 'Composición al completo' (23 chars) chosen for concision and brand voice — clara, motivadora.
_notes.studio_starter_name: [REVIEW] 'Studio' plan group has no approved es-ES term in ontology. Kept as-is. Confirm with localization lead.

plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro: Todo lo de Studio Starter, más:
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro_all: Todo lo de Studio Pro, más:

_notes.midi_editor: Approved es-ES term: 'editor MIDI' (feat_00000001, status: pending).
_notes.piano_roll: Anglicism preserved per ontology (feat_00000006). Approved es-ES term: 'Piano Roll'.
_notes.pattern_sequencer: Approved es-ES term: 'secuenciador por patrones' (feat_00000002, status: pending).
_notes.arrangement_timeline: Approved es-ES term: 'línea de arreglos' (feat_00000007, status: pending).
_notes.multitrack_recording_8: Approved es-ES base term: 'grabación multipista' (feat_00000009, status: pending). Track count appended in Spanish.
_notes.audio_comping: [REVIEW] 'Audio Comping' not in ontology. Transcreated as 'selección de tomas' (descriptive translation of comping workflow). Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.punch_in_recording: [REVIEW] 'Punch-In Recording' not in ontology. En-US notes suggest anglicism preferred. Used 'grabación punch-in'. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.sample_library_20gb: Approved es-ES base term: 'librería de samples' (feat_00000008, status: pending).
_notes.effects_rack: Approved es-ES term: 'rack de efectos' (feat_00000010, status: pending).
_notes.mastering_chain: [REVIEW] Approved es-ES term: 'cadena de mástering' (feat_00000012, status: pending). IMPORTANT: feat_00000012 availability is 'not_available' for es-ES. Flag for product review — this feature may not be shown in es-ES UI.
_notes.loudness_analyzer: [REVIEW] 'Loudness Analyzer' not in ontology. 'Loudness' kept as technical anglicism (LUFS-standard terminology in professional audio). Used 'analizador de loudness'. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.melody_generator: Approved es-ES term: 'generador de melodías' (feat_00000011, status: pending).
_notes.chord_progression_generator: Approved es-ES term: 'generador de progresiones de acordes' (feat_00000014, status: pending).
_notes.drum_pattern_generator: [REVIEW] 'Drum Pattern Generator' not in ontology. Transcreated as 'generador de patrones de batería' following same naming pattern as melody_generator and chord_progression_generator. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.style_transfer: Approved es-ES term: 'transferencia de estilos' (feat_00000013, status: pending). IMPORTANT: feat_00000013 availability is 'planned' for es-ES. Flag for product review.
_notes.export_mp3: Approved es-ES term basis: 'exportar en mp3' (feat_00000005). Capitalised 'MP3' per format abbreviation convention.
_notes.export_wav_flac: Approved es-ES term basis: 'exportar en wav/flac' (feat_00000015). Capitalised WAV/FLAC.
_notes.chord_explorer: [REVIEW] 'Chord Explorer' not in ontology. Transcreated as 'explorador de acordes'. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.scale_assistant: [REVIEW] 'Scale Assistant' not in ontology. Transcreated as 'asistente de escalas'. Confirm with localization lead.

confirmation.page_subtitle: Tu estudio está listo. Empieza a crear.

_notes.page_title: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is the user's display name. 'Todo listo' is an idiomatic fixed phrase — no gender agreement required, avoiding the 'bienvenido/a' issue.
_notes.checklist_plan: [PLACEHOLDER] {plan_name} inserts a localised plan name (e.g. 'Creator Pro'). Word order changed: 'Plan {plan_name} activado' is more natural in Spanish than '{plan_name} plan activado'.
